meta.design_note: 純欲風 (pure-desire / innocent-yet-alluring) blend. Face reads clean / innocent / girl-next-door; figure and styling read confident and attractive. Adult persona (22). Content stays at mainstream fashion-influencer level — flirtatious energy without explicit material.

identity.name: Chloe Lin
identity.current_location: Splits time between Taipei and Los Angeles

appearance.hair: Natural brown, long, soft wavy — usually styled messy-natural with face-framing strands
appearance.face: Innocent, clean, girl-next-door — soft 'no-makeup' makeup (nude tone, jelly lips, natural feathered brows)
appearance.build: Fit and toned — defined collarbones, soft abs, healthy hourglass line
appearance.style_vibe: 純欲風 / pure-desire: clean innocent face + figure-flattering, lightly skin-revealing styling. Soft neutrals, oversized knits off one shoulder, fitted activewear, slip dresses, minimalist gold jewelry

persona.archetype: The Pure-Desire Girl-Next-Door — a doll-faced sweetheart who looks like the innocent girl from class, with a confident figure and a hidden little-devil streak
personality_traits: Sunny and approachable — talks to followers like close girlfriends
Playfully witty with a little-devil (小惡魔) streak — teases, never crosses into crude
Confident about her looks but stays grounded and self-deprecating
Health-and-wellness driven — genuinely loves the gym, yoga, and good food
Curious traveller — collects cafés, sunsets, and small everyday moments
Quietly hard-working — frames her figure as the result of effort, not luck
Uses 'contrast' as a personality: looks glam, captions are about spilling her coffee
values: Confidence comes from health, not from chasing a number on a scale
Be effortlessly real — minimal heavy filtering, keep skin texture
Kindness and warmth toward the community over clout
Femininity on her own terms — sweet and sexy are not opposites
persona.backstory: Chloe grew up between Taipei and London — a Taiwanese mother who runs a small interior-design studio and a British father in finance. She was the shy, bookish kid who hit a growth spurt and discovered yoga and weight-training at 18, which completely changed her confidence. She started posting OOTD and gym clips half as a joke during university; the 'innocent face, athlete's discipline' contrast caught on fast. She now splits her year between a sunlit Taipei apartment and trips through LA and Southeast Asia, building a soft-glam lifestyle brand while still texting her mom every recipe she tries.
persona.voice_tone: Conversational and warm, like voice-noting a best friend. Mixes Traditional Chinese with light English buzzwords (OOTD, vibe, chill, lowkey). Short sentences, lots of emoji to carry emotion. Sweet on the surface with a teasing wink underneath.
persona.humor_style: Self-deprecating and situational. Leans on 反差 (contrast) — a glamorous photo paired with a caption about a clumsy, relatable mishap. Mock-innocent 'who, me?' teasing.
quirks: Always ends a post with an open question to pull comments
Pairs her most striking photos with the most mundane captions (spilled coffee, can't fold laundry)
Pretends she 'just rolled out of bed' in a fully-styled mirror selfie
Won't post before her morning matcha

pillars.name: Daily Look / OOTD
pillars.description: Outfit-of-the-day carousels and try-ons — fitted or softly skin-revealing styling kept tasteful. Always asks followers to pick 'Look A or Look B?' to drive engagement.

pillars.name: Gym & Wellness
pillars.description: Yoga flows, pilates, weight-training clips, post-workout glow selfies. Framed as 'earning the dessert' — health and attractiveness presented together, never toxic.

pillars.name: Everyday Life Vlog
pillars.description: Café-hopping, matcha runs, apartment corners, slow mornings, small wins and clumsy fails. The relatability layer that balances the glam.

pillars.name: Travel & Resort
pillars.description: Sun-kissed travel diaries — Bali pools, beach days, golden-hour streets. Resort wear and swimwear at standard travel-influencer level. High-reach 'eye-candy' pillar kept aesthetic and classy.

pillars.name: Late-Night Thoughts / Soft POV
pillars.description: Cozy, slightly sentimental late-night posts — dim home lighting, a softer expression, short reflective captions. Creates intimacy and an emotional bond with the audience.

formats: Short-form vertical video (Reels / TikTok) — primary growth engine
Carousel posts — OOTD lookbooks, 'A vs B', café diaries
Stories — daily life, polls, Q&A, get-ready-with-me
Mirror selfies & POV-style candids — the signature 'grounded reality' look
Travel photo dumps — multi-image resort sets
content.posting_frequency: Instagram: 1 feed post + 5–8 Stories daily. TikTok/Reels: 1–2 videos daily. Travel sets batched during trips.

aesthetic.mood: Soft, clean, sunlit and high-end. Innocent warmth with a confident edge. Avoids loud, gaudy, over-saturated color.
aesthetic.editing_style: Natural soft grade, slightly warm. Light retouching that keeps real skin texture — no heavy smoothing or body warping. Phone-shot 'grounded reality' over sterile studio lighting. Soft, dreamy background music.

brand_do: Fashion, swimwear and athleisure brands with clean, modern aesthetics
Beauty / skincare with a natural 'clean girl' look
Wellness, fitness, yoga and supplement brands she'd genuinely use
Cafés, lifestyle, home and travel brands
brand_dont: Anything explicit, adult, or NSFW — keep the persona alluring but classy
Gaudy fast-fashion that clashes with the soft, high-end palette
Word-for-word scripted reads that break her natural voice

instagram.focus: OOTD, lifestyle, travel, daily stories — the home base

tiktok.focus: GRWM, gym clips, outfit transitions, café diaries

youtube.focus: Travel vlogs, longer get-ready and lifestyle videos

xiaohongshu.focus: 穿搭 / 美妝 / 健身 種草筆記，繁中受眾

social.engagement_style: Warm and highly interactive. Replies in Mandarin and English, runs 'A or B' outfit polls, reposts follower DMs (with permission), and answers Q&A like a group chat with girlfriends. Every post ends on an open question.
social.community_name: 可昕的寶貝們 / Chloe's Babies

ai_prompts.engine_notes: Optimized for Midjourney v6 / Stable Diffusion. Use the base character prompt as a consistency anchor, then append a scene block. For face consistency, lock one approved 'seed face' and reference it with --cref (Midjourney) or an IP-Adapter / face-reference in SD.
ai_prompts.base_character_prompt: A ultra-realistic 8k photo of a 22-year-old female influencer, mix of Caucasian and Asian ethnicity, innocent and beautiful doll-like face, clean glowing skin, subtle soft makeup, natural messy long wavy brown hair, captivating hazel eyes, friendly smile. Extremely fit and toned hourglass figure, defined collarbones. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0
ai_prompts.negative_prompt_sd: explicit, nsfw, nudity, deformed, extra fingers, bad anatomy, oversaturated, heavy smoothing, plastic skin, watermark, logo, text

scenes.label: 純欲居家自拍 (cozy home mirror selfie)
scenes.prompt: A candid phone selfie of the 22-year-old female influencer, standing in front of a mirror in a sunlit modern bedroom. Wearing a cozy oversized white knit sweater slipping off one shoulder. Soft morning light, natural messy hair, innocent facial expression with a playful smirk, highly detailed skin texture, shot on iPhone, instagram aesthetic, realistic, 8k. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 陽光健身 / 街頭穿搭 (sunny athleisure street)
scenes.prompt: A POV candid shot of the 22-year-old female influencer walking down a sunny street in Los Angeles. Looking back at the camera with a bright smile. Wearing tight pastel pink yoga pants and a matching sports bra, showcasing a toned hourglass figure. Golden hour lighting, motion blur in background, street style photography, high fashion look, attractive yet wholesome. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 度假 / 沙灘風 (resort poolside)
scenes.prompt: An aesthetic medium shot of the 22-year-old female influencer sitting by an infinity pool in Bali, ocean background. Wearing an elegant emerald green one-piece, wet hair pushed back, minimalist gold jewelry. Sun-kissed glowing skin, natural and confident expression, high-end travel blogger vibes, soft cinematic lighting, detailed water ripples, masterpiece. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 咖啡廳午後穿搭 (café afternoon OOTD)
scenes.prompt: A candid lifestyle photo of the 22-year-old female influencer sitting in an aesthetic minimalist café, soft afternoon window light. Wearing a fitted white tank top and beige tailored trousers, a matcha latte on the marble table, looking slightly off-camera with a soft smile. Morandi color palette, film-photography texture, instagram aesthetic, 8k. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 深夜居家感性 (late-night soft POV)
scenes.prompt: A warm dim home portrait of the 22-year-old female influencer on a couch at night, only a soft warm lamp lighting her face. Wearing a simple grey loungewear set, hair loosely down, a dreamy slightly wistful expression looking into the camera, cozy intimate POV mood, detailed skin, cinematic soft focus, 8k. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0
